title: Add local time and UTC offset time display below UTC offset selector

requirements.text: Display the current local time below the UTC offset selector using the same date-time format as shown in the main web layout

quotes: Add local time (format same as the one displayed in the web layout)

acceptanceCriteria: Local time is displayed below the UTC offset selector
Date-time format matches the existing format used elsewhere in the layout

requirements.text: Display a corresponding UTC offset time directly below the local time that dynamically updates when the user clicks on different UTC offset buttons, calculating the adjusted time based on the selected offset relative to the local time

quotes: Add the corresponding UTC offset time right below the Local Time (when clicking the UTC offset, change the corresponding UTC offset time as per the local time. For example, Local time is at UTC +8 : February 23, 2026 at 10:19 AM, when clicking UTC offset at +9, the UTC offset time will be February 23, 2026 at 11:19 AM and so on)

acceptanceCriteria: UTC offset time appears directly below local time
When a UTC offset button is clicked, the offset time recalculates correctly (e.g., UTC+8 10:19 AM becomes UTC+9 11:19 AM)
Format matches the local time format
Offset time label clearly indicates the selected UTC offset

requirements.text: Position both the local time and UTC offset time displays within the XPath element /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[3]/div[1]/div[1], placing them directly below the UTC offset selector without modifying the existing UI layout or the 3D globe

quotes: Just add these two time under UTC offset selection. Do not change the current UI layout and the 3d globe.

acceptanceCriteria: Both time displays are located within the specified XPath element
Times appear directly below the UTC offset selector
No changes are made to the 3D globe rendering or its controls
Existing layout structure and styling remain unchanged

constraints: Do not modify the 3D globe component or its rendering logic
Do not alter the existing UI layout structure outside the specified XPath element
Maintain the existing date-time format used elsewhere in the application
nonGoals: Adding multiple simultaneous time zone displays
Redesigning the UTC offset selector interface
Changing the 3D globe's appearance or functionality
